name: agentab
description: 将任意标签页变为 AI 智能体的 Chrome 扩展

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: eslint lib/**/*.js background/**/*.js content/**/*.js sidepanel/**/*.js popup/**/*.js settings/**/*.js tasks/**/*.js history/**/*.js scripts/**/*.js
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix lib/**/*.js background/**/*.js content/**/*.js sidepanel/**/*.js popup/**/*.js settings/**/*.js tasks/**/*.js history/**/*.js scripts/**/*.js
scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for this extension'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run security && npm run test
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run security

author: Agentab Team
